title: Jalnyr's Weaponary
description: A mod that adds many new and interesting weapons
body:
This mod adds tons of new and interesting weapons with varying power. 
For now there is three weapons and few new resources:
- Froststeel Sword
- Froststeel Greatsword
- Froststeel DualSword
- Froststeel Katana
- Froststeel Knife
- Froststeel Spear
- Flamemetal Sword
- Flamemetal Katana
- Flamemetal Knife
- Flamemetal Spear

This mod also adds a new type of wood: The Frozen wood
Frozen trees spawn in cold biomes and sticks crafted from them can be used to craft the froststeel weapons.
There is two new metals that can be found underground. They are:
- Froststeel
- Flamemetal
You can use these metals to craft some powerful weapons that deal more damage than netherite.

The items have custom models and high quality textures
[![bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Fallen_World/MP_FallenWorld_promo.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/jalnyr?r=jalnyrsweaponarymodrinth)
